card.criteria: The Team Lead maps the requested doctor/preflight boundary to concrete text in all three target documents.; The Team Lead identifies any inconsistency, missing statement, or overclaim, or states that none were found.; No source code or documentation is modified by the Team Lead during this verify Work Unit.; The Team Lead returns a decision-ready verify summary with evidence references.
